ul.li:
Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
CodeDisplay
EmCare.B14S2.DE32Oral Thrush
EmCare.B14S2.DE33Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Deep and Extensive
EmCare.B14S2.DE34Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Not Deep and Extensive

title.value: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

description.value: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

display.value: Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Deep and Extensive

value.value: The client has mouth sores or mouth ulcers that are deep and extensive

display.value: Mouth Sores or Mouth Ulcers - Not Deep and Extensive

value.value: The client has mouth sores or mouth ulcers that are not deep and extensive
